import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "invoice": string;
  "client": string;
  "amount": number;
  "tax": number;
  "due": string;
  "paid": boolean;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Invoices",
  "description": "Track invoices and payment status.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": true,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "invoice",
      "label": "Invoice #",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "client",
      "label": "Client",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "amount",
      "label": "Amount",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "tax",
      "label": "Tax",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "due",
      "label": "Due Date",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "paid",
      "label": "Paid",
      "type": "switch",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
